productDisplayName: Palm Tree Girl's Benita Blue Kidswear
description: CompositionDark blue denim shorts made of 100% cotton that is mildly stretchable, with fabric lining around waistline, two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back, light brown thread detailing, foldover hem design, branded button, and studs and palm tree embroidery on the left side near pocketFittingRegular 60 cm Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash with like colours Wash/dry inside out Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decor Remove all detatchable accessories Indulge the sporty side of your little girl in these comfy shorts from gini and jony that plays as hard as she does. The soft fabric of the shorts keeps your little girl comfortable all day. team this with white or pink tees and crocs footwear for a great time out with friends.
